plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-327 closes descriptor-only coverage for RP10.P04.M04.S18-RP10.P04.M06.S15: the M04 secondary workflow tail, the full M05 permission and audit binding UI cycle, and the M06 synthetic fixture set head across 40 planned RP10 intake-core rows. The pack records Hermes/UI evidence, review-required prompt rows, permission badges, audit hints, denied states, responsive layout, fixture binding, build smoke, and no unauthorized count leak coverage without opening runtime intake, API, AI, permission, audit, or UI execution surfaces. Claude review is explicitly waived by owner instruction for this run and is not counted as review evidence.
